mentions.note: Not good enough a story to justify 16x earnings, and Cramer won't tolerate the caller's margin position — told him to cut losses.
Really bad quarter; wait another quarter before considering entry; renewable uptake narrative needs re-proof.

Solar panel maker down 30% from Dec 2025 peak; 27% earnings growth at 11x PE. Trump bias against wind not solar; high tariffs favor domestic production. BlackRock CEO Fink bullish on solar as growth driver.
Profitable company but facing lawsuit; technical chart is one of the worst Cramer has seen—be careful here.
